title: convolvulus microphyllus var. heterotrichus
intro: Convolvulus microphyllus var. heterotrichus, also known as the small-leaved morning glory, is a plant species that belongs to the family Convolvulaceae. The plant is reported to have medicinal properties due to its antipyretic, diuretic, and anti-inflammatory properties. Its health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating urinary issues, and treating wounds, as well as having potential antitumor and antimicrobial effects. Convolvulus microphyllus var. heterotrichus can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and decoctions to harness its medicinal benefits.
